articles.author: Rana Taha
articles.title: US deports migrants, including Iranian activist, to CAR - DW
articles.description: The number of migrants deported is not yet clear, but it is believed to be around two dozen. The Trump administration has signed controversial deals with several African countries to deport migrants it cannot send home.
articles.content: The US has deported a number of migrants to the Central African Republic, one of the world's poorest and most troubled states, under a controversial deal that allows Washington to deport migrants who… [+4032 chars]
